summary: This is a very brief personal blog post from DHH's early blogging days on Loud Thinking. He promotes his younger brother's inline skating movie project called 'Stolen Moments,' which showcases Danish inline skating talent. The post notes the film will be available on DVD and VHS in late spring. It's essentially a family shoutout with no technical or opinion content.
key_points: DHH promotes his younger brother's inline skating film project 'Stolen Moments'
The film showcases the best inline skating talent in Denmark
Early example of DHH's personal blogging before he became known for tech opinions
money_quotes: My younger brother is working on a inline skating movie showcasing the best Denmark has to offer.
key_insight: A brief personal shoutout post from DHH's early blogging era, notable only as a historical artifact from before his tech commentary career took shape.
